commented_code:
-name: "build"
+name: "Build CI/CD Pipeline"
 
 on:
-  pull_request:
-  schedule:
-    - cron: "0 0 * * *" # Run everyday
+ push:
+   branches: [main, develop]
+   paths-ignore:
+      - "*.md"           
+      - "docs/**"  
+   
+ pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
+    paths-ignore:
+      - "*.md"
+      - "docs/**"
+ schedule:
+   - cron: "0 0 * * *" 
+  
+ workflow_dispatch: 
 
 jobs:
   build:
+    name: Build and Test
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
-      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6
+      - name: Checkout Repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v5
+     
+      - name: Set up uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
         with:
           enable-cache: true
-          cache-dependency-glob: uv.lock
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+          cache-dependency-glob: |
+            **/uv.lock           
+            **/pyproject.toml    
+      - name: Set up Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: 3.x
+          python-version: "3.11" 
           allow-prereleases: true
-      - run: uv sync --group=test
+      - name: Install dependencies

@@ -1,38 +1,71 @@
-name: "build"
+name: "Build CI/CD Pipeline"
 
 on:

-  schedule:
-    - cron: "0 0 * * *" # Run everyday

+ workflow_dispatch: 
 
 jobs:
   build:

     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
-      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6

+

-          cache-dependency-glob: uv.lock
-      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5

+            **/uv.lock           
+            **/pyproject.toml

         with:

+          python-version: "3.11"

-      - run: uv sync --group=test

discussion_comments.comment_body: `uv sync --group=test` tells the reader more than `Install dependencies`.

commented_code:
name: directory_writer
 on: [push]
 jobs:
-  build:
+  directory_writer:

discussion_comments.commented_code:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 name: directory_writer
 on: [push]
 jobs:
-  build:
+  directory_writer:
discussion_comments.comment_body: It is too confusing to have two GitHub Actions jobs named `build`, so rename this job to document what it really does.
